titleStmt.title: SII 40.94: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 94. (A.R. No. B. 72 of 1930.) Goṭṭipalle, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab lying near the ruined Mātangēśvara temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1230, Kīlaka, Pushya, śu. 13, Thursday, Makara-Saṅkrānti, corresponding to 1308 A.D., December 26.
Register the grant of land in Tammaḍipalle to the temple of Mātaṅgēśvara by Maṅchaya-Nayiniṅgāru, a subordinate of the king for the merit of his soverign on the occasion of Makara-saṅkramaṇa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1230
Agunēṁṭi kīlaka saṁvatsara pu
ṣya śu 13 gunāṁṭi makara saṁ
krāmaṇa kālamunaṁdu svasti
śrīmanmahā maṁḍalēśvara
mūrurāya jagaddāla kā
katiyya pratāparudradē
vamahārājulakuṁ bu
ṇyamugānu tatpādapadmōpa
jīvituṁḍaina svāmidrōhara
gaṁḍa māṁcayanāyiniṁ gā
ru śrīmātaṁgēśvara mahādē
varaḷaku tammaḍipalle pola
mu nīru nēla velipolamu be
ḍḍaṁgalaku pruvrittuluṁnnu Ā
khaṁḍakāṁpulu Evaru da
ppinānu gaṁggaka¨rtvana ni sa
vva nyamugānu Ācaṁdrā
¨rkkasthāyigānicce . dīnikevva
ru vighnamu cēsinānu gaṁ
ga kaṟtataveyi gavilalaṁ jaṁpi
navāru tamapeddakoḍku kapā
lanu boḍicinavāru .
Digital edition of SII 40.94 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
